meta.name: ansible
meta.title: Ansible Skill
meta.description: Ansible conventions and best practices Triggers on: **/*.yaml, **/*.yml

original_definition.skill_description: Ansible conventions and best practices Triggers on: **/*.yaml, **/*.yml

actions.name: Use Ansible to configure and manage infrastructure.
actions.description: Use Ansible to configure and manage infrastructure.

actions.name: Start names with an action verb that indicates the operation
actions.description: Start names with an action verb that indicates the operation being performed, such as "Install," "Configure," or "Copy"

actions.name: Omit the role name from role tasks; Ansible will automatical
actions.description: Omit the role name from role tasks; Ansible will automatically display the role name when running a role

actions.name: Use tags to dynamically create groups based on environment,
actions.description: Use tags to dynamically create groups based on environment, function, location, etc.

actions.name: If you have to use `shell` or `command`, use the `creates:`
actions.description: If you have to use `shell` or `command`, use the `creates:` or `removes:` parameter, where feasible, to prevent unnecessary execution

actions.name: Use the `ansible.builtin` collection for [builtin modules an
actions.description: Use the `ansible.builtin` collection for [builtin modules and plugins](https://docs.ansible.com/ansible/latest/collections/ansible/builtin/index.html#

actions.name: Group related tasks together to improve readability and modu
actions.description: Group related tasks together to improve readability and modularity

actions.name: Use the following process to make it easy to find where vaul
actions.description: Use the following process to make it easy to find where vaulted variables are defined

actions.name: 1. Create a `group_vars/` subdirectory named after the group
actions.description: 1. Create a `group_vars/` subdirectory named after the group

actions.name: 2. Inside this subdirectory, create two files named `vars` a
actions.description: 2. Inside this subdirectory, create two files named `vars` and `vault`

actions.name: 3. In the `vars` file, define all of the variables needed, i
actions.description: 3. In the `vars` file, define all of the variables needed, including any sensitive ones

actions.name: 6. Encrypt the `vault` file to protect its contents
actions.description: 6. Encrypt the `vault` file to protect its contents

actions.name: When using other tools with Ansible (e.g., Terraform), store
actions.description: When using other tools with Ansible (e.g., Terraform), store secrets in a third-party secrets management tool (e.g., Hashicorp Vault, AWS Secrets Mana

actions.description: It improves readability and reduces changeset collisions for version control
